title: Gold Spiral Birthday Candles for Cakes, Pack of 12 Pieces Long Twisty Gold Party Candles with Candle Holders, Tall Candles for Wedding, Birthday, Party Decorations, Anniversary and Meetups
features: ✨ Premium Quality Set: Includes 12 elegant spiral candles, designed to effortlessly enhance your cake presentation. Each candle measures approximately 14 cm in length (holder included) and 0.5 cm in diameter—perfect for adding sophistication to any special occasion.

🌀 Unique Spiral Design: Crafted with an exquisite spiral shape and a shimmering metallic finish, these candles create a magical, fairy-like appearance on cakes. Each candle comes with its own plastic holder, ensuring stability and preserving the cake's flawless look.

🎉 Versatile for Any Occasion: Ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Valentine’s Day, Christmas, baby showers, and more. They also make charming decorations in cafes, bakeries, or homes, adding warmth and elegance to every setting.

🕯️ Durable & Clean Base: Each candle features a robust plastic base to prevent wax drips and maintain a neat, polished appearance. They also double as stylish cake toppers, enhancing your festive decorations.

🌿 Eco-Friendly & Safe: Made from non-toxic, smokeless wax, these candles burn cleanly without harmful chemicals. Safe and environmentally friendly, they're suitable for celebrations involving both children and adults.
description: Product description Pack of 12 Long Spiral Gold Party Candles with Candle Holders, Birthday Candles, Party Candles, Long Thin Cupcake Candles for Birthday Wedding Party Anniversary Decoration Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Extinguish candle before leaving the room or going to sleep. Dispose of candle remnants responsibly.
